_provenance.note: Real-Anvil baseline reflecting post-VIB-4396 reality. VIB-4426 tracks the proper V4 LP accounting fix — V4 receipt parser needs to emit a PoolKey hash so _clean_pool_address_candidate can resolve it, otherwise LP_OPEN/LP_CLOSE events are dropped by lp_handler with 'cannot resolve pool address ... dropping event'. Once VIB-4426 lands, expect LP4=PASS to be restored. Until then this baseline locks the known regression so the matrix can guard against further drift. See almanak/framework/accounting/category_handlers/lp_handler.py:_clean_pool_address_candidate docstring for the architectural constraint.
